::: {.callout-tip}
## Push your changes

Now you are at the end of the practical, commit your changes with Git and push them to GitHub.

1. Click `Push` in the Git panel to save the changes to GitHub.
2. Enter your UserName and your Personal Access Token. If you don't have your token or it doesn't work, visit [this page](https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens) while logged into your GitHub account, click on the {{< meta course-title >}} token and choose `Regenerate token`.
3. Visit your GitHub account and check that your changes are there.
:::
